title: SIX
review: Went with Alice; got to move to better seats in the front row of the Balcony. We were so tired going to see this, but it was definitely the right show - it woke us right up. Just high-energy, pop, sparkly fun about Henry VIII.
full_description: In the worldwide hit musical SIX, the six ex-wives of British King Henry VIII take the microphone and — finally — tell their stories. Using songs inspired by pop icons like Beyoncé, Adele, and Ariana Grande, each queen tries to prove that she had it the hardest. An explosion of pop, power and girl power.
ai_summary: Six queens of Henry VIII reclaim their stories in a pop-concert format, each making the case to be lead vocalist of the group with songs inspired by contemporary pop icons. Winner of Tony Awards for Best Original Score and Best Costume Design — 80 minutes, no interval.
